title: Sign Tools
description:
Client-sided mod which allows you to copy, paste and edit signs!
Don't waste your time to make identical signs anymore, just copy and paste them!
body:
![Sign Tools mod description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2cf53107c054469cc271bc1ad75cd22bdf6f526.png)

<details>
  <summary>Extended description</summary>
  This is a client-sided mod which allow you to copy, paste and edit signs.
  It will add some buttons into your sign-editing GUI to improve your experience.

  There are also some useful key bindings:
   - Copy sign content you look at
   - Auto-paste content into newly placed signs
</details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dRhPJnkW2T4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
